response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit experience in IT consulting, UML architecture modeling, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this role; his remote work history and diverse tech stack are assets, but the absence of client-facing advisory experience and language compliance raises significant concerns.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack leadership across diverse technologies and domains
Strong DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience with Docker, GitLab, and deployment systems
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No demonstrated experience in IT consulting, client advisory, or requirements management
Lack of explicit UML or formal architecture design documentation in resume
